features: GENTLE SHOWER CREAM ‚Äì This luxurious shower cream, enriched with Almond Oil, gently cleanses and nourishes for silky-soft and smooth skin with a gentle scent
DUAL BODY AND SKIN CARE ‚Äì Acts as a cleansing lotion and moisturising cream, leaving your skin refreshed while enhancing its natural protective barrier

Infused with almond oil and Hydra IQ technology, it deeply moisturises while enhancing your skin‚Äôs natural barrier, leaving it feeling soft, smooth, and hydrated. Vitamins C and E add an extra layer of protection, preventing dryness and keeping your skin healthy and radiant. This shower gel is part of NIVEA‚Äôs commitment to sustainability, featuring a 99% biodegradable formula that‚Äôs microplastic-free, packaged in 97% recycled plastic, and 100% climate neutralised.
